tech_news.title: Battlefield 6 Is Getting A Feature Not Seen In 21 Years And A Top Gun Crossover - GameSpot
reMarkable’s new Paper Pure is good. That’s why I wrote this review on it. - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Remarkable's Paper Pure replaces Remarkable 2, and it is quite good.

tech_news.title: ‘Fallout 5’ in Preproduction, ‘Elder Scrolls 6’ Is Bethesda’s ‘Primary Development Focus’ Following Xbox Layoffs, Studio Chief Says - Variety
tech_news.description: Bethesda Game Studios' Todd Howard confirms "Fallout 5" is in the works and "The Elder Scrolls 6" is the studio's top priority.

tech_news.title: Even Microsoft couldn’t make Windows 11 work well on 8GB of RAM - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft’s new entry-level 13-inch Surface Laptop pairs last year’s  great hardware with a higher price and just 8GB of RAM. Thanks, RAMageddon.

tech_news.title: Claims about GTA 6 pre-orders are incorrect and "absurd", analyst firm says, but it's still had the "strongest pre-order campaign ever recorded" - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: Estimates suggest GTA 6 made $260 million in pre-orders in its first week alone.

tech_news.title: Siri AI vs. Old Siri on Apple Watch: It Wasn't Even Close - CNET
tech_news.description: The WatchOS 27 public beta is here, and Apple's revamped assistant finally does what Siri should have been doing all along.

tech_news.title: No, Doom maker id Software hasn't been "nerfed into the ground and gutted" by the Xbox cuts, insists director Hugo Martin - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: Doom and Quake creator id Software tries to reassure fans it's okay following the devastating recent Xbox cuts.

tech_news.title: Amateur astronomer spotted the Tesla Roadster Elon Musk launched in space and what he saw caused a bit of panic - supercarblondie.com

tech_news.title: Final Fantasy XIV Mobile to end service on September 30 in China, global version canceled - Gematsu
tech_news.description: LightSpeed Studios will end service on the Chinese version of Final Fantasy XIV Mobile for iOS and Android on September 30, the company announced. The global version is no longer in development.
